description: Cut a dash with these low top shoes for the cosmopolitan male from red tape. Styled in sophisticated leather, wear them with stone washed denims, a casual plaid shirt and a stylish leather jacket. Upper High quality leather upper for protection, comfort and durability Reinforced overlay for the heel Perforations all over the upper for enhanced ventilation and breathability Padded sockliner for instep comfort Midsole Rubber midsole for comfort Outsole TPR outsole with a raised heel shoe care Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
